translation: Thus Kanesh, say to Aqil-tax, our messenger, every single colony, and the trading stations: The tablet has come to the City.
From this tablet to the City! - day it is destroying up to this very day! No one may buy tin from the palace. The Kanesh colony will receive it.

As you hear our letter, whether he has either sold it to a palace or has offered it to a palace or has offered it to a palace or has not yet sold it, so he has not yet sold it. As much good property belongs to this man, write to me in the tablet and do with our messenger who sent me in a tablet, and I shall do with the first express caravan.
I sent a decision concerning every single colony and to the trading stations. Let us go to every single colony and the trading stations.
